task_statement: Repair sensitive-path classifier false positive blocking P4 official Building commits. Current commit_sandbox_output blocks changed source file support/operator/run_chat_session.py because _path_has_provider_session_like_segment splits underscores and treats any segment named session as provider-session-like payload. Required behavior: source code filenames like support/operator/run_chat_session.py are not sensitive path writes; real provider-session payload paths like logs/provider-session-state.json, runs/conversation_id.txt, nested/runtime-session/body.json remain sensitive; .env/*.pem/*.key and auth/credential/secret/token segments remain blocked. This is support integrity repair only, not P4 AgentFact implementation.
selection_rule: manual small graph because this is a narrow support classifier unblocker for official P4 build route

nodes.work_statement:
Implement narrow classifier repair. Modify support/operator/write_observation.py and focused checker(s) only as needed. Add negative/positive probes: _raw_sensitive_path_writes(['support/operator/run_chat_session.py']) must NOT mark sensitive; provider-session-like payload paths logs/provider-session-state.json, runs/conversation_id.txt, nested/runtime-session/body.json must remain marked; .env commit block still fires before staging. Run py_compile changed files, focused building_operator_driver0 profile/checker, git diff --check, and check_profile.py --all if feasible. Do not touch P4 AgentFact validator files.

STRICT SCOPE: unblocker for P4 only. Do not implement P4 AgentFact changes here. Do not broaden into release/export/dashboard/provider/pytest. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. No secrets/session bodies in output. Movement is forward/reroute only; HOLD is lifecycle. Checker green is support evidence only.

If implementation gap remains, return transition_concern_evidence targeting work.
